message: Node started: Perform a formal verification of the three identified correspondences between Quantum Darwinism and Holographic Quantum Error Correction: 1) Redundancy-Subsystem Correspondence (Information spreading via environment vs. code subspace), 2) Locality-Decoherence Correspondence (Bulk-boundary mapping vs. pointer state stability), and 3) Entanglement-Entropy Scaling (Area law vs. information redundancy). Identify specific gaps regarding the non-equilibrium nature of QD versus the equilibrium/stationary nature of HQEC.
